# Logwick

> Logwick is the audit log for AI agents. Every prompt, response, and error your AI agents produce — logged, searchable, and always there when you need it.

Logwick captures every AI agent action in production — inputs, outputs, tokens, latency, costs, and errors — and makes them searchable from a dashboard or queryable via API. One line of code after your AI call. Free to start.

## What Logwick does

- Logs every AI agent action — agent name, action type, input, output, status, tokens, latency, cost
- Provides a searchable dashboard for investigating incidents and monitoring AI agent behavior
- Sends webhook alerts when error rates spike
- Exports logs as CSV for compliance and reporting
- Connects to Claude Desktop via MCP — query logs in plain English
- Accepts payments from AI agents via x402 — no account required, $0.001 USDC per log

## Who uses Logwick

Developers and companies building AI-powered applications who need visibility into what their AI agents are doing in production. Particularly useful for debugging incidents, monitoring costs, and meeting compliance requirements.

## Quick start

Sign up at https://logwick.io to get an API key. Then add one line after each AI call:

```javascript
fetch('https://logwick.io/api/v1/logs', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    agent: 'gpt-4o',
    action: 'email_draft',
    status: 'success',
    input: userPrompt,
    output: result,
    tokens: 312,
    latency_ms: 1842,
    user: currentUser.email
  })
}).catch(() => {})
```

## SDK installation

```bash
npm install logwick
pip install logwick
```

## API endpoints

- POST https://logwick.io/api/v1/logs — Ingest a log entry (requires API key)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/logs — Query logs (requires API key)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/stats — Get usage statistics (requires API key)
- POST https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-log — Ingest a log entry via x402 payment (no API key required)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-log — Discover x402 pricing (returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements)

## Authentication

API key authentication: Pass your API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
x402 payment authentication: POST to /api/v1/agent-log with a signed x402 payment — no account required.

## MCP server

Connect Logwick to Claude Desktop via MCP:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "logwick": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@logwick/mcp"],
      "env": { "LOGWICK_API_KEY": "your-key" }
    }
  }
}
```

Available MCP tools: ingest_log, query_logs, get_stats, get_log, delete_log

## Pricing

- Free: 5,000 logs/month, 7-day retention, 1 API key, CSV export
- Pro: $29/month — 100,000 logs/month, 90-day retention, unlimited webhooks, 10 API keys
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, custom retention up to 7 years, SLA, SSO

## x402 pay-per-log

AI agents can log without an account by paying $0.001 USDC per log on Base mainnet (eip155:8453). The endpoint returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements on GET requests. Listed on agentic.market.

## Documentation

Full documentation: https://logwick.io/docs
Node.js SDK: https://npmjs.com/package/logwick
Python SDK: https://pypi.org/project/logwick
MCP server: https://npmjs.com/package/@logwick/mcp
GitHub: https://github.com/logwickio
